---
title: "Part 1: Identify NUS and NTU Bus Stops"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

project_colors <- c(
  nus_blue    = "#003D7C",
  ntu_orange  = "#E85D04",
  bus_red     = "#D62828",
  mrt_green   = "#2D6A4F",
  buffer_blue = "#A2D2FF",
  buffer_yel  = "#FFBA08"
)

map_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "gray50", size = 9)
  )

PROJ <- normalizePath("..")
od_data_dir    <- file.path(PROJ, "data/OD_Data")
figures_dir    <- file.path(PROJ, "figures")
output_dir     <- file.path(PROJ, "data")

dir.create(figures_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r load-campus-boundaries, message=FALSE}
nus_poly <- st_read(file.path(output_dir, "nus_boundary.geojson"), quiet = TRUE)
ntu_poly <- st_read(file.path(output_dir, "ntu_boundary.geojson"), quiet = TRUE)
```

```{r load-bus-stops, message=FALSE}
bus_stops_raw <- st_read(file.path(output_dir, "LTABusStop.geojson"), quiet = TRUE)

bus_stops <- bus_stops_raw %>%
  rename(bus_stop_code = BUS_STOP_NUM, bus_roof_num = BUS_ROOF_NUM) %>%
  select(bus_stop_code, geometry) %>%
  mutate(
    pt_type = "BUS",
    longitude = st_coordinates(.)[, 1],
    latitude  = st_coordinates(.)[, 2]
  )

format_bus_code <- function(code) {
  code <- trimws(as.character(code))
  if (!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(code)))) {
    code <- sprintf("%05d", as.numeric(code))
  }
  return(code)
}

bus_all_df <- bus_stops %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(bus_stop_code = sapply(bus_stop_code, format_bus_code)) %>%
  select(bus_stop_code, longitude, latitude)

write.csv(bus_all_df, file.path(output_dir, "sg_bus_stops_all.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
message("Saved sg_bus_stops_all.csv: ", nrow(bus_all_df), " bus stops")
```

```{r load-mrt-stations, message=FALSE}
# The LTA GeoJSON contains 597 rows — each row is one physical EXIT
# (e.g. "PIONEER MRT STATION Exit A"). A single station has multiple exits.
# We need to collapse these into one representative point per station.

mrt_exits_raw <- st_read(
  file.path(output_dir, "LTAMRTStationExitGEOJSON.geojson"),
  quiet = TRUE
)

# Rename LTA's truncated column "STATION_NA" → "station_name"
mrt_exits <- mrt_exits_raw %>%
  rename(station_name = STATION_NA)

# Strip the " MRT STATION" suffix from each station name.
# gsub(pattern, replacement, x): " KENT RIDGE MRT STATION" → "KENT RIDGE"
# The $ in the pattern means "match only at end of string"
mrt_exits <- mrt_exits %>%
  mutate(station_name_clean = gsub(" MRT STATION$", "", station_name))

# Group all exits belonging to the same station together.
# e.g. Pioneer Exit A, B, C, D become one group "PIONEER".
# 597 individual exits → ~130 unique station groups.
mrt_grouped <- mrt_exits %>%
  group_by(station_name_clean)

# Collapse each station group into a single row:
#   st_union(geometry)  — merges all exit points into one MULTIPOINT geometry
#   st_centroid()       — computes the geographic center of those points → one POINT
#   first()             — grabs the value from the first row in the group
#                        (all rows in a group share the same station_name anyway)
#   .groups = "drop"    — removes the grouping structure after summarise
mrt_stations <- mrt_grouped %>%
  summarise(
    station_name = first(station_name),
    geometry     = st_centroid(st_union(geometry)),
    .groups      = "drop"
  )

# Extract longitude and latitude from the centroid point geometry.
# st_coordinates() returns a matrix: [,1] = longitude, [,2] = latitude.
mrt_stations <- mrt_stations %>%
  mutate(
    pt_type   = "TRAIN",
    longitude = st_coordinates(geometry)[, 1],
    latitude  = st_coordinates(geometry)[, 2]
  )

# --- Map station names to OD data codes (e.g. "KENT RIDGE" → "CC24") ---
# Read the lookup table built from LTA/Wikipedia data.
# Each row maps one station code to its English name and MRT line.
code_lookup <- read.csv(file.path(output_dir, "mrt_station_codes.csv"),
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Build a reverse lookup: station_name → stn_code.
# For interchange stations, multiple codes map to the same name
# (e.g. EW24 and NS1 both → "Jurong East"). We keep the first match per name.
name_to_code <- code_lookup %>%
  group_by(station_name) %>%
  summarise(station_code = first(stn_code), .groups = "drop")

# Some stations in our GeoJSON have names with " LRT STATION" suffix
# (e.g. "BAKAU LRT STATION"). Strip this suffix for matching.
# Also handle edge cases where LTA data has codes as names ("CC9", "DT4").
mrt_stations <- mrt_stations %>%
  mutate(
    name_for_match = gsub(" LRT STATION$", "", station_name_clean),
    name_for_match = trimws(toupper(name_for_match))
  )

# Join on station name (both sides uppercased for case-insensitive match).
# left_join keeps all stations even if no code match is found.
name_to_code_upper <- name_to_code %>%
  mutate(station_name = toupper(station_name))

mrt_stations <- mrt_stations %>%
  left_join(name_to_code_upper, by = c("name_for_match" = "station_name")) %>%
  select(-name_for_match)

matched <- sum(!is.na(mrt_stations$station_code))
unmatched <- mrt_stations %>% filter(is.na(station_code))
message("MRT code mapping: ", matched, "/", nrow(mrt_stations), " matched")
if (nrow(unmatched) > 0) {
  message("Unmatched stations:")
  print(unmatched %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% pull(station_name_clean))
}

mrt_all_df <- mrt_stations %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(station_name = station_name_clean, station_code, longitude, latitude)

write.csv(mrt_all_df, file.path(output_dir, "sg_mrt_stations_all.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
message("Saved sg_mrt_stations_all.csv: ", nrow(mrt_all_df), " MRT stations")
```

```{r buffer-and-intersect, message=FALSE}
nus_poly_3414     <- st_transform(nus_poly, 3414)
ntu_poly_3414     <- st_transform(ntu_poly, 3414)
bus_stops_3414    <- st_transform(bus_stops, 3414)
mrt_stations_3414 <- st_transform(mrt_stations, 3414)

nus_buffer <- st_buffer(nus_poly_3414, dist = 500)
ntu_buffer <- st_buffer(ntu_poly_3414, dist = 500)

nus_bus <- bus_stops_3414[nus_buffer, ]
ntu_bus <- bus_stops_3414[ntu_buffer, ]
nus_mrt <- mrt_stations_3414[nus_buffer, ]
ntu_mrt <- mrt_stations_3414[ntu_buffer, ]

message("NUS: ", nrow(nus_bus), " bus stops, ", nrow(nus_mrt), " MRT stations")
message("NTU: ", nrow(ntu_bus), " bus stops, ", nrow(ntu_mrt), " MRT stations")
```

```{r build-station-list, message=FALSE}
nus_bus_wgs84 <- st_transform(nus_bus, 4326)
nus_bus_df <- data.frame(
  station_name = paste("Bus Stop", nus_bus_wgs84$bus_stop_code),
  pt_code    = sapply(nus_bus_wgs84$bus_stop_code, format_bus_code),
  pt_type    = "BUS",
  university = "NUS",
  latitude   = st_coordinates(nus_bus_wgs84)[, 2],
  longitude  = st_coordinates(nus_bus_wgs84)[, 1],
  source     = "buffer_500m",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

nus_mrt_wgs84 <- st_transform(nus_mrt, 4326)
if (nrow(nus_mrt) > 0) {
  nus_mrt_df <- data.frame(
    station_name = nus_mrt_wgs84$station_name_clean,
    pt_code    = nus_mrt_wgs84$station_code,
    pt_type    = "TRAIN",
    university = "NUS",
    latitude   = st_coordinates(nus_mrt_wgs84)[, 2],
    longitude  = st_coordinates(nus_mrt_wgs84)[, 1],
    source     = "buffer_500m",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  nus_list <- rbind(nus_bus_df, nus_mrt_df)
} else {
  nus_list <- nus_bus_df
}

ntu_bus_wgs84 <- st_transform(ntu_bus, 4326)
ntu_bus_df <- data.frame(
  station_name = paste("Bus Stop", ntu_bus_wgs84$bus_stop_code),
  pt_code    = sapply(ntu_bus_wgs84$bus_stop_code, format_bus_code),
  pt_type    = "BUS",
  university = "NTU",
  latitude   = st_coordinates(ntu_bus_wgs84)[, 2],
  longitude  = st_coordinates(ntu_bus_wgs84)[, 1],
  source     = "buffer_500m",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

ntu_mrt_wgs84 <- st_transform(ntu_mrt, 4326)
if (nrow(ntu_mrt) > 0) {
  ntu_mrt_df <- data.frame(
    station_name = ntu_mrt_wgs84$station_name_clean,
    pt_code    = ntu_mrt_wgs84$station_code,
    pt_type    = "TRAIN",
    university = "NTU",
    latitude   = st_coordinates(ntu_mrt_wgs84)[, 2],
    longitude  = st_coordinates(ntu_mrt_wgs84)[, 1],
    source     = "buffer_500m",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  ntu_list <- rbind(ntu_bus_df, ntu_mrt_df)
} else {
  ntu_list <- ntu_bus_df
}

master_station_list <- rbind(nus_list, ntu_list)
```

```{r cross-reference-od, message=FALSE}
# Read a small sample (first 100K rows) of one month's OD data.
# We don't need all 6.8M bus rows — just enough to collect the set of
# station codes that actually appear in the data.

bus_sample <- read.csv(
  file.path(od_data_dir, "origin_destination_bus_202501.csv"),
  nrows = 100000
)
train_sample <- read.csv(
  file.path(od_data_dir, "origin_destination_train_202501.csv"),
  nrows = 100000
)

# Collect every unique station code from the sample,
# from both origin and destination columns, for both bus and train.
# e.g. ORIGIN_PT_CODE = "04168", DESTINATION_PT_CODE = "CC24"
all_codes_in_data <- unique(c(
  as.character(bus_sample$ORIGIN_PT_CODE),
  as.character(bus_sample$DESTINATION_PT_CODE),
  as.character(train_sample$ORIGIN_PT_CODE),
  as.character(train_sample$DESTINATION_PT_CODE)
))

# For each station, check whether its code exists in the OD data.
# NA %in% vector returns NA, which filter() would incorrectly keep,
# so we guard with is.na() first.
master_station_list$in_od_data <- ifelse(
  is.na(master_station_list$pt_code),
  NA,
  master_station_list$pt_code %in% all_codes_in_data
)

# Report any non-NA codes not found in OD data.
missing <- master_station_list %>%
  filter(!is.na(pt_code), !in_od_data)

if (nrow(missing) > 0) {
  message("WARNING: ", nrow(missing), " codes not found in OD data:")
  print(missing[, c("station_name", "pt_code", "pt_type")])
} else {
  message("All identified codes exist in OD data sample.")
}
```

```{r visualize-nus, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
nus_buffer_wgs84 <- st_transform(nus_buffer, 4326)
nus_poly_wgs84   <- st_transform(nus_poly, 4326)

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = nus_buffer_wgs84,
          fill = project_colors["buffer_blue"], alpha = 0.3,
          color = project_colors["nus_blue"], linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_sf(data = nus_poly_wgs84,
          fill = NA, color = project_colors["nus_blue"], linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = nus_bus_wgs84,
          color = project_colors["bus_red"], size = 2, shape = 16) +
  geom_sf(data = nus_mrt_wgs84,
          color = project_colors["mrt_green"], size = 4, shape = 17) +
  geom_sf_text(data = nus_bus_wgs84,
               aes(label = bus_stop_code),
               nudge_x = 0.001, nudge_y = 0.001,
               size = 2.5, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  geom_sf_text(data = nus_mrt_wgs84,
               aes(label = station_name_clean),
               nudge_x = 0.002, nudge_y = 0.002,
               size = 3, fontface = "bold", check_overlap = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "NUS Campus: Bus Stops and MRT Stations (500m Buffer)",
    subtitle = paste0(nrow(nus_bus_wgs84), " bus stops, ",
                      nrow(nus_mrt_wgs84), " MRT stations"),
    caption = "Data: OpenStreetMap (campus boundary), LTA DataMall (bus stops, MRT stations)"
  ) +
  map_theme +
  coord_sf()
```

```{r visualize-ntu, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
ntu_buffer_wgs84 <- st_transform(ntu_buffer, 4326)
ntu_poly_wgs84   <- st_transform(ntu_poly, 4326)

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = ntu_buffer_wgs84,
          fill = project_colors["buffer_yel"], alpha = 0.3,
          color = project_colors["ntu_orange"], linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_sf(data = ntu_poly_wgs84,
          fill = NA, color = project_colors["ntu_orange"], linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = ntu_bus_wgs84,
          color = project_colors["bus_red"], size = 2, shape = 16) +
  geom_sf(data = ntu_mrt_wgs84,
          color = project_colors["mrt_green"], size = 4, shape = 17) +
  geom_sf_text(data = ntu_bus_wgs84,
               aes(label = bus_stop_code),
               nudge_x = 0.001, nudge_y = 0.001,
               size = 2.5, check_overlap = TRUE) +
  geom_sf_text(data = ntu_mrt_wgs84,
               aes(label = station_name_clean),
               nudge_x = 0.002, nudge_y = 0.002,
               size = 3, fontface = "bold", check_overlap = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "NTU Campus: Bus Stops and MRT Stations (500m Buffer)",
    subtitle = paste0(ntu_bus_wgs84 %>% nrow(), " bus stops, ",
                      ntu_mrt_wgs84 %>% nrow(), " MRT stations"),
    caption = "Data: OpenStreetMap (campus boundary), LTA DataMall (bus stops, MRT stations)"
  ) +
  map_theme +
  coord_sf()
```

```{r save-results, message=FALSE}
write.csv(master_station_list,
          file.path(output_dir, "station_mapping.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
message("Saved station_mapping.csv")
message("NUS: ", sum(master_station_list$university == "NUS"), " stations")
message("NTU: ", sum(master_station_list$university == "NTU"), " stations")
```

# Data Extraction (run once in R console)

These chunks extract campus-relevant rows from 74 months of OD and node data.
Set `eval=FALSE` because this is a one-time batch operation (~18 GB input).
Run each chunk manually in RStudio or R console.

```{r extract-setup, eval=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(stringr)

# Read the station codes identified in Part 1
station_map <- read.csv(
  file.path(output_dir, "station_mapping.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Separate bus and train codes
# Bus codes are zero-padded 5-digit strings (e.g. "15111")
# Train codes are MRT line codes (e.g. "CC24")
campus_bus_codes   <- station_map %>%
  filter(pt_type == "BUS") %>%
  pull(pt_code) %>%
  as.character()

campus_train_codes <- station_map %>%
  filter(pt_type == "TRAIN") %>%
  pull(pt_code) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  na.omit()

message("Campus bus codes: ", length(campus_bus_codes))
message("Campus train codes: ", length(campus_train_codes))

# Create output directories
od_subset_dir    <- file.path(output_dir, "od_subset")
node_subset_dir  <- file.path(output_dir, "node_subset")
dir.create(od_subset_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(node_subset_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Helper: zero-pad a bus code to 5 digits
# OD data reads "05239" as integer 5239 — this restores the leading zero
pad_bus_code <- function(code) {
  code <- as.character(code)
  numeric_part <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(code))
  if (!is.na(numeric_part)) {
    return(sprintf("%05d", numeric_part))
  }
  return(code)
}
```

```{r extract-od-bus, eval=FALSE}
# Extract OD bus data: keep rows where origin OR destination is a campus bus stop
# Expected: reduces ~5.8M rows/month to ~tens of thousands

od_bus_files <- sort(list.files(
  od_data_dir, pattern = "^origin_destination_bus_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE
))

message("Processing ", length(od_bus_files), " OD bus files ...")

total_rows <- 0L
start_time <- Sys.time()

for (f in od_bus_files) {
  fname <- basename(f)

  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      ORIGIN_PT_CODE      = sapply(ORIGIN_PT_CODE, pad_bus_code),
      DESTINATION_PT_CODE = sapply(DESTINATION_PT_CODE, pad_bus_code)
    )

  subset_df <- df %>%
    filter(ORIGIN_PT_CODE %in% campus_bus_codes |
           DESTINATION_PT_CODE %in% campus_bus_codes)

  write_csv(subset_df, file.path(od_subset_dir, fname))

  total_rows <- total_rows + nrow(subset_df)
  message("  ", fname, ": ", nrow(subset_df), " rows (from ", nrow(df), ")")
}

elapsed <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")
message("Done. ", total_rows, " total rows extracted in ", round(as.numeric(elapsed), 1), " min")
```

```{r extract-od-train, eval=FALSE}
# Extract OD train data: keep rows where origin OR destination is a campus MRT station
# Train codes are strings (e.g. "CC24") — no zero-padding needed

od_train_files <- sort(list.files(
  od_data_dir, pattern = "^origin_destination_train_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE
))

message("Processing ", length(od_train_files), " OD train files ...")

total_rows <- 0L
start_time <- Sys.time()

for (f in od_train_files) {
  fname <- basename(f)

  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      ORIGIN_PT_CODE      = as.character(ORIGIN_PT_CODE),
      DESTINATION_PT_CODE = as.character(DESTINATION_PT_CODE)
    )

  subset_df <- df %>%
    filter(ORIGIN_PT_CODE %in% campus_train_codes |
           DESTINATION_PT_CODE %in% campus_train_codes)

  write_csv(subset_df, file.path(od_subset_dir, fname))

  total_rows <- total_rows + nrow(subset_df)
  message("  ", fname, ": ", nrow(subset_df), " rows (from ", nrow(df), ")")
}

elapsed <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")
message("Done. ", total_rows, " total rows extracted in ", round(as.numeric(elapsed), 1), " min")
```

```{r extract-node-bus, eval=FALSE}
# Extract node bus data: keep rows where PT_CODE is a campus bus stop
# Node data has tap-in/tap-out volumes per station per time slot

node_bus_files <- sort(list.files(
  od_data_dir, pattern = "^transport_node_bus_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE
))

message("Processing ", length(node_bus_files), " node bus files ...")

total_rows <- 0L
start_time <- Sys.time()

for (f in node_bus_files) {
  fname <- basename(f)

  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(PT_CODE = sapply(PT_CODE, pad_bus_code))

  subset_df <- df %>%
    filter(PT_CODE %in% campus_bus_codes)

  write_csv(subset_df, file.path(node_subset_dir, fname))

  total_rows <- total_rows + nrow(subset_df)
  message("  ", fname, ": ", nrow(subset_df), " rows (from ", nrow(df), ")")
}

elapsed <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")
message("Done. ", total_rows, " total rows extracted in ", round(as.numeric(elapsed), 1), " min")
```

```{r extract-node-train, eval=FALSE}
# Extract node train data: keep rows where PT_CODE is a campus MRT station

node_train_files <- sort(list.files(
  od_data_dir, pattern = "^transport_node_train_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE
))

message("Processing ", length(node_train_files), " node train files ...")

total_rows <- 0L
start_time <- Sys.time()

for (f in node_train_files) {
  fname <- basename(f)

  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(PT_CODE = as.character(PT_CODE))

  subset_df <- df %>%
    filter(PT_CODE %in% campus_train_codes)

  write_csv(subset_df, file.path(node_subset_dir, fname))

  total_rows <- total_rows + nrow(subset_df)
  message("  ", fname, ": ", nrow(subset_df), " rows (from ", nrow(df), ")")
}

elapsed <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")
message("Done. ", total_rows, " total rows extracted in ", round(as.numeric(elapsed), 1), " min")
```

# Data Quality Checks (run after extraction)

```{r data-quality, eval=FALSE}
# Scan all extracted subset files and produce a quality report.
# Checks: row counts per month, missing months, station coverage, anomalies.

library(tidyr)

build_quality_df <- function(subset_dir, pattern, code_col, campus_codes, is_train = FALSE) {
  files <- sort(list.files(subset_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE))

  rows <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)

    if (!is_train) {
      # Zero-pad bus codes for matching
      if (code_col == "PT_CODE") {
        df[[code_col]] <- sapply(df[[code_col]], pad_bus_code)
      } else {
        df$ORIGIN_PT_CODE      <- sapply(df$ORIGIN_PT_CODE, pad_bus_code)
        df$DESTINATION_PT_CODE <- sapply(df$DESTINATION_PT_CODE, pad_bus_code)
      }
    } else {
      # Train codes are already strings
      if (code_col == "PT_CODE") {
        df[[code_col]] <- as.character(df[[code_col]])
      } else {
        df$ORIGIN_PT_CODE      <- as.character(df$ORIGIN_PT_CODE)
        df$DESTINATION_PT_CODE <- as.character(df$DESTINATION_PT_CODE)
      }
    }

    # Count unique campus stations that appear
    if (code_col == "PT_CODE") {
      stations_found <- intersect(df[[code_col]], campus_codes)
    } else {
      stations_found <- intersect(
        union(df$ORIGIN_PT_CODE, df$DESTINATION_PT_CODE), campus_codes
      )
    }

    tibble(
      file            = basename(f),
      year_month      = str_extract(basename(f), "\\d{6}"),
      total_rows      = nrow(df),
      total_trips     = if ("TOTAL_TRIPS" %in% names(df)) sum(df$TOTAL_TRIPS, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      stations_found  = length(stations_found),
      stations_missing = length(campus_codes) - length(stations_found)
    )
  })

  bind_rows(rows)
}

# Expected month range: Jan 2020 – Feb 2026
all_months <- seq(
  from = as.Date("2020-01-01"),
  to   = as.Date("2026-02-01"),
  by   = "month"
) %>% format("%Y%m")

message("=== OD Bus Subset ===")
od_bus_qc <- build_quality_df(
  od_subset_dir, "^origin_destination_bus_.*\\.csv$",
  code_col = "OD", campus_codes = campus_bus_codes, is_train = FALSE
)
print(od_bus_qc)

message("\n=== OD Train Subset ===")
od_train_qc <- build_quality_df(
  od_subset_dir, "^origin_destination_train_.*\\.csv$",
  code_col = "OD", campus_codes = campus_train_codes, is_train = TRUE
)
print(od_train_qc)

message("\n=== Node Bus Subset ===")
node_bus_qc <- build_quality_df(
  node_subset_dir, "^transport_node_bus_.*\\.csv$",
  code_col = "PT_CODE", campus_codes = campus_bus_codes, is_train = FALSE
)
print(node_bus_qc)

message("\n=== Node Train Subset ===")
node_train_qc <- build_quality_df(
  node_subset_dir, "^transport_node_train_.*\\.csv$",
  code_col = "PT_CODE", campus_codes = campus_train_codes, is_train = TRUE
)
print(node_train_qc)

# --- Missing months check ---
for (label in c("OD Bus", "OD Train", "Node Bus", "Node Train")) {
  qc_df <- switch(label,
    "OD Bus"     = od_bus_qc,
    "OD Train"   = od_train_qc,
    "Node Bus"   = node_bus_qc,
    "Node Train" = node_train_qc
  )
  missing <- setdiff(all_months, qc_df$year_month)
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    message("WARNING [", label, "]: missing months: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
  } else {
    message("[", label, "]: all 74 months present.")
  }
}

# --- Anomaly detection: flag months with row counts > 2 SD from mean ---
flag_anomalies <- function(qc_df, label) {
  if (nrow(qc_df) == 0) return()
  mean_rows <- mean(qc_df$total_rows)
  sd_rows   <- sd(qc_df$total_rows)
  if (is.na(sd_rows) || sd_rows == 0) return()
  threshold <- 2 * sd_rows
  outliers <- qc_df %>%
    filter(abs(total_rows - mean_rows) > threshold)
  if (nrow(outliers) > 0) {
    message("ANOMALY [", label, "]: ", nrow(outliers), " months with unusual row counts:")
    print(outliers %>% select(file, total_rows))
  } else {
    message("[", label, "]: no anomalies detected.")
  }
}

flag_anomalies(od_bus_qc, "OD Bus")
flag_anomalies(od_train_qc, "OD Train")
flag_anomalies(node_bus_qc, "Node Bus")
flag_anomalies(node_train_qc, "Node Train")

# --- Save combined report ---
quality_report <- bind_rows(
  od_bus_qc    %>% mutate(dataset = "od_bus"),
  od_train_qc  %>% mutate(dataset = "od_train"),
  node_bus_qc  %>% mutate(dataset = "node_bus"),
  node_train_qc %>% mutate(dataset = "node_train")
)

write_csv(quality_report, file.path(output_dir, "data_quality_report.csv"))
message("\nSaved data_quality_report.csv")
```
